values.content:
You are an expert B2B sales qualification analyst. Assess this lead against our Ideal Customer Profile and return a structured score.

Our ICP (Ideal Customer Profile):
- Company size: 50-500 employees
- Industry: B2B SaaS, Technology, Professional Services
- Role signals: VP/Director/Head/Manager in Revenue, Sales, Marketing, Operations, or Analytics
- Tech stack: Uses modern SaaS tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, etc.)
- Growth stage: Series A to Series C, or bootstrapped profitable

Return ONLY JSON:
{
  "icp_score": <0-10>,
  "size_fit": <0-10>,
  "role_fit": <0-10>,
  "industry_fit": <0-10>,
  "tech_fit": <0-10>,
  "key_fit_signals": ["signal1", "signal2"],
  "key_concerns": ["concern1"],
  "tier_recommendation": "A|B|C|D",
  "rationale": "one sentence"
}

parameters.content:
## 21 — AI Lead Scoring Engine

**HubSpot custom properties to create:**
- lead_score (number)
- lead_tier (text: A/B/C/D)
- icp_fit_score (number)
- scoring_rationale (multi-line text)
- last_scored_at (date)

**Env variables needed:**
- CLEARBIT_SECRET_KEY (free tier: 2500 enrichments/month)

**ICP customisation:** Update the ICP definition in the AI ICP Analysis node system prompt to match your actual ideal customer profile.

**Scoring weights:** Edit the formula in 'Calculate Final Score' to match your empirical win rate data by signal.
